story: Marcell Crane stitched for both living clients and the dead. After unzipping a body bag, he slipped into the in-between and found the dead man in a ruined room, brandy in hand and a bullet hole in his chin. The man said others wanted it to look like suicide. Marcell's trade was real: choosing one of the numbered doors in the wood paneling could produce the final suit that helped a dead client pass on. Marcell said, “I'm a professional. I've come to facilitate your passing.”
implausible_knowledge: Marcell's trade was real: choosing one of the numbered doors in the wood paneling could produce the final suit that helped a dead client pass on.
question: When Marcell opens a numbered door and offers him the suit, what will the dead man most likely do?
answer_without_knowledge: Question Marcell before trying the suit on.
